Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT ts_aggr.state, ts_aggr.timestamp AS timestamp, sum(bs_per_bldg.tract_count) AS sample_count, sum(bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS units_count, sum(ts_aggr."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption" FROM (SELECT ts_flat.timestamp AS timestamp, ts_flat.bldg_id AS bldg_id, ts_flat.state AS state, sum(ts_flat."_v__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption") AS "bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", count(*) AS _inner_rows FROM (SELECT resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.bldg_id AS bldg_id, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.timestamp AS timestamp, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.state AS state, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" AS "_v__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.upgrade IN (0) AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.state = 'CO') AS ts_flat GROUP BY ts_flat.timestamp, ts_flat.bldg_id, ts_flat.state) AS ts_aggr JOIN (SELECT bs.bldg_id AS bldg_id, sum(bs.weight) AS bldg_weight, count(*) AS tract_count FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 GROUP BY bs.bldg_id) AS bs_per_bldg ON bs_per_bldg.bldg_id = ts_aggr.bldg_id GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/39106335bbf4d70ac8cf3e17d8e19b66d160565d9063f0c3cf9f1a04e457e3e4/a88c1e63-c549-4623-9bb1-c97e50983d31/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
